//: Project config — the single place for settings that were previously env vars and hardcoded literals. Deployed on-chain artifacts live in .controller/manifest.json (keyed by network). Env vars still override individual values everywhere.
//keyFile: Deploy/operator private key (raw hex, one line). Relative to this config's dir. Override per-machine with the KEYFILE env var instead of hardcoding an absolute path.

session.//: FIXED DEMO KEYS (testnet only, publicly known) — a real deployment generates per-user keys. These reconstruct the deployed demo account's lock args byte-for-byte.
